title: cordylanthus tenuis subsp. barbatus
intro: Cordylanthus tenuis subsp. barbatus, also known as Purple Owl's Clover, is a rare and endangered perennial plant species native to the coastal scrub habitats of California. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Purple Owl's Clover include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cordylanthus tenuis subsp. barbatus typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
